query:
INSERT INTO posts (platform, post_type, caption_en, caption_es, image_url, scheduled_at, status) VALUES
('both', 'manual', '🔥 Made fresh right here in Jackpot, NV! Watch our kitchen in action — this is what real carne asada looks like. Come taste the difference at Sopris Restaurant, inside 4 Jacks Casino! 🌮

#SoprisRestaurant #JackpotNV #CarneAsada #MadeFromScratch #KitchenLife #CasinoEats #FreshFood #MexicanFood #BehindTheScenes #FoodVideo', '🔥 ¡Hecho fresco aquí mismo en Jackpot, NV! Mira nuestra cocina en acción — así es como se ve la carne asada de verdad. ¡Ven a probar la diferencia en Sopris Restaurant, dentro de 4 Jacks Casino! 🌮

#SoprisRestaurant #JackpotNV #CarneAsada #HechoFresco #CocinaEnAccion', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/118351434/CyaqFioxWNTNQC4ZpfULjM/1000011817_50c19984.mp4', 1774378800000, 'scheduled'),
('both', 'manual', '🍕 Fresh flavors daily! Our Supreme Pizza is loaded with every topping you could want — made fresh to order right here at Sopris Restaurant inside 4 Jacks Casino, Jackpot NV. Come get a slice! 🎰

#SoprisRestaurant #JackpotNV #SupremePizza #FreshPizza #CasinoFood #PizzaLovers #FreshFlavors #JackpotNevada #FoodVideo #MadeToOrder', '🍕 ¡Sabores frescos todos los días! Nuestra Pizza Suprema está cargada con todos los ingredientes que puedas querer — hecha fresca a pedido en Sopris Restaurant dentro de 4 Jacks Casino, Jackpot NV. ¡Ven a probar una rebanada! 🎰

#SoprisRestaurant #JackpotNV #PizzaSuprema #PizzaFresca', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/118351434/CyaqFioxWNTNQC4ZpfULjM/1000011818_a8e5ec9d.mp4', 1774551600000, 'scheduled'),
('both', 'manual', '👨‍🍳 This is how we do it every single day. Our kitchen never stops — real ingredients, real technique, real flavor. Sopris Restaurant inside 4 Jacks Casino, Jackpot NV. 🌮🔥

#SoprisRestaurant #JackpotNV #KitchenLife #BehindTheScenes #RealFood #MadeFromScratch #CasinoEats #MexicanFood #ChefLife #FoodVideo', '👨‍🍳 Así lo hacemos todos los días. Nuestra cocina nunca para — ingredientes reales, técnica real, sabor real. Sopris Restaurant dentro de 4 Jacks Casino, Jackpot NV. 🌮🔥

#SoprisRestaurant #JackpotNV #VidaDeCocina #DetrasDeEscena #ComidaReal', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/118351434/CyaqFioxWNTNQC4ZpfULjM/20260319_174032_5a11a74e.mp4', 1774983600000, 'scheduled'),
('both', 'manual', '🍕 Every great pizza starts with the sauce. Ours is made in-house and spread fresh on every single pie. Watch the magic happen at Sopris Restaurant, inside 4 Jacks Casino, Jackpot NV! 🎰

#SoprisRestaurant #JackpotNV #PizzaTime #HomemadeSauce #FreshPizza #KitchenLife #BehindTheScenes #CasinoFood #MadeFromScratch #FoodVideo', '🍕 Toda gran pizza comienza con la salsa. La nuestra se hace en casa y se extiende fresca en cada pizza. ¡Mira la magia en Sopris Restaurant, dentro de 4 Jacks Casino, Jackpot NV! 🎰

#SoprisRestaurant #JackpotNV #TiempoDePizza #SalsaCasera #PizzaFresca', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/118351434/CyaqFioxWNTNQC4ZpfULjM/20260319_174119_b1df3132.mp4', 1775156400000, 'scheduled'),
('both', 'promotion', '🍦 THIS is what you could win! Local artisan ice cream in flavors you won''t find anywhere else — mango, orange, vanilla, chocolate and more.

Want a FREE double scoop? Check in at Sopris Restaurant on Facebook, tag us in your food photo, and you''re entered to WIN every week! 🎉

Inside 4 Jacks Casino • Jackpot, NV

#SoprisRestaurant #JackpotNV #IceCream #ArtisanIceCream #FreeIceCream #Giveaway #CheckIn #Win #LocalFlavors #CasinoEats', '🍦 ¡ESTO es lo que podrías ganar! Helado artesanal local en sabores que no encontrarás en ningún otro lugar — mango, naranja, vainilla, chocolate y más.

¿Quieres una bola doble GRATIS? ¡Regístrate en Sopris Restaurant en Facebook, etiquétanos en tu foto de comida y participas para GANAR cada semana! 🎉

Dentro de 4 Jacks Casino • Jackpot, NV', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/118351434/CyaqFioxWNTNQC4ZpfULjM/20260319_174332_1368487c.mp4', 1775588400000, 'scheduled'),
('both', 'borderline_brew', '☕ Good morning, Jackpot! Border Boost & Brew™ is warming up and ready to fuel your day. Espresso, lattes, cold brew, energy drinks and more — right inside 4 Jacks Casino. Come get your boost! ⚡

#BorderBoostAndBrew #BBB #JackpotNV #CoffeeTime #Espresso #MorningCoffee #CasinoCoffee #EnergyDrinks #ColdBrew #GoodMorning', '☕ ¡Buenos días, Jackpot! Border Boost & Brew™ está calentando y lista para energizarte. Espresso, lattes, cold brew, bebidas energéticas y más — dentro de 4 Jacks Casino. ¡Ven a obtener tu boost! ⚡

#BorderBoostAndBrew #BBB #JackpotNV #CaféDelDía #Espresso #BuenosDías', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/118351434/CyaqFioxWNTNQC4ZpfULjM/20260319_174353_f58eacc6.mp4', 1775761200000, 'scheduled');
